did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The paper describes a handheld multiphoton and pinhole-free reflectance confocal microscopy system for noninvasive skin imaging. While the discussion section mentions that the inherently digital nature of the images presents a 'unique opportunity for the application of artificial intelligence (AI)' to enhance interpretation, the study itself did not use AI, machine learning, or deep learning to obtain its results. The results were obtained through direct optical imaging and manual observation of histological features (e.g., basaloid nests, elongated rete ridges) compared to biopsy-proven diagnoses.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
